hard_gates.detail: Metrics owned by ATM-415 sprint; reviewed under controller verification scope.
Synthetic cohort only. No PII. PRNG seed is public. All nonclaims present.

dimensions.notes: conversion_rate, aov, refund_rate, guardrail_breach all map directly to product intent and user satisfaction.
Deterministic cohort confirmed — two runs with seed=42 produce identical results (events=368, 13.0% conversion, $5.72 AOV).
No vanity metrics. Refund rate alongside conversion prevents optimizing one-sided. No gross revenue without conversion denominator.
Fully synthetic. Sequential u-prefixed IDs. No email, no payment data. PRNG seed is public.

non_claims: does not prove real user traffic or conversion
does not prove real payment processing
synthetic cohort only — not real traffic
KPIs are simulation outputs — no real business metrics
